events.title: JP confirms 5 remaining decisiones pendientes from 2026-05-18 redesign
events.notes: Critical-path gate. JP reviews 00_META/proposals/2026-05-18_proceso-comercial-fases.md and confirms / objects on Skill 07.5, discount range, FOSS booking tool, day-7 email template + tone, Fase 2/3 deferral, $900K + 2-meetings price. Until this lands, all redesign-execution work (skill builds, automation, state machine) is blocked.

events.title: Nexostrat real-capabilities catalog (1-pager: price + timeline + stack)
events.notes: Redirected by 2026-05-18 redesign — now feeds JP's prompt content for Skills 06 (Análisis Profundo) and 07 (Soluciones Implementables). Deliverable shape unchanged: 1-pager with service + fixed price + timeline + stack + 'cannot deliver today' list. Blocked on JP confirmation.

events.title: Confidence marking ✓/~/? in company-analyst
events.notes: Small edit to SKILL.md so output figures are marked by confidence level. Independent of redesign — can run any time.

events.title: Technical brainstorm — phase state machine + automation triggers + event taxonomy
events.notes: Via superpowers:brainstorming → superpowers:writing-plans. Output spec at docs/superpowers/specs/. Feeds rewrite of Plans 02-08. Gated on JP confirmation.

events.title: Rebrand 06_discovery_meeting → 04_briefing_30min (structural placeholder)
events.notes: Mechanical work, ~30 min. JP delivers new content separately via e-jp-skill-content-delivery. Blocked on JP confirmation.

events.title: JP delivers content / prompts for Skills 04 (adjusted) + 05 + 06 + 07 + 07.5 (if confirmed) + 08
events.notes: Owner JP. Per-skill markdown deliverables: prompt body + expected output structure + 1 worked example. Can be delivered all-at-once or skill-by-skill. Ricardo wraps each into skills/NN_<name>/ shape per t-build-skill-wrappers.

events.title: Ricardo wraps each delivered skill into skills/NN_<name>/ shape
events.notes: Per skill from JP: SKILL.md + scripts/generate_docx.py + tests/ + CHANGELOG.md + .claude/skills/ symlink. ~1-2h per skill. Incremental as JP delivers.

events.title: Update state.json schema + transition validator for the 4-phase model
events.notes: Replace prospect / exploring / diagnostico_delivered with phase_0_intake / phase_0_skill_chain / ... / phase_3_retainer_active. Schema at infra/schemas/state.schema.json. Validator at infra/agents/_lib/state.py. Updates Plan 07 scope. Gated on technical brainstorm.

events.title: Build automation surface — Calendly + payment + day-7 email + day-14 alert + meeting recording
events.notes: Concrete artifacts after the technical brainstorm picks tooling. Gated on Plan 02 (FOSS docs stack) for booking + email tool choices.
